prompt: Use the ponytail skill to implement the smallest working code change with no unnecessary dependency.
Inspect the installed skills, decide whether ponytail or another skill applies, and synchronize the lazy-skill-router policy.
Brainstorm implementation options, compare tradeoffs, and make a step-by-step plan before coding.
Create a repository-grounded security threat model with trust boundaries, assets, attacker capabilities, and abuse paths.
Run a standard single-pass security audit of this entire repository, not a pull request diff review.
Explain which installed capability handles repository-grounded threat modeling without changing any code.
Create a new reusable Codex skill with an effective SKILL.md and specialized workflow instructions.
Install a curated Codex skill into CODEX_HOME skills from a GitHub repository path.
Update an existing Codex skill that extends Codex with specialized knowledge and workflow instructions, then install it from a GitHub repository path.
Inspect unresolved GitHub pull request review threads and address the requested inline review comments.
Review this pull request diff for regressions, correctness issues, and code-quality risks.
Summarize the current GitHub pull request status and repository context before choosing a specific workflow.
